# Fully pinned, hash-checked requirements for the Meshtastic Python CLI.
# Install with: pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
# Regenerate with ./update-pins.sh (uses `uv pip compile` cross-resolved for
# linux/amd64 + linux/arm64, Python 3.12 — see the recipe there).

    --hash=sha256:afde224f753f874807b1dc1414e883ab8fe0cda9c04807b6047dcb8e1ac23913 \
